categories.title: Wigs & units

categories.title: Frontals
categories.benefit: 13×4 and 13×6 ear-to-ear lace — versatile styling and deep parting.

categories.title: Braiding hair
categories.benefit: Pre-stretched and expression packs — neat braids with less tension.

categories.title: Hair care
categories.benefit: Moisture, silk protection, and maintenance essentials for longer wear.

categories.title: Tools & accessories
categories.benefit: Caps, bands, edge tools, and install helpers — everything in one place.
